The additional detail I would like to add is that while formalin prevents autolysis through its preservative action on enzymes within tissues, it also significantly contributes to preventing microbial contamination, ensuring the quality and safety of the specimens during handling and subsequent processing stages. Therefore, stating 'to prevent autolysis' alone misses out on these other important functions performed by formalin.
